title: Update dependency docker to ~=7.2.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [docker](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py) ([changelog](https://docker-py.readthedocs.io/en/stable/change-log.html)) | `~=7.1.0` → `~=7.2.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/pypi/docker/7.2.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/pypi/docker/7.1.0/7.2.0?slim=true) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the [Dependency Dashboard](../issues/18109) for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-py (docker)</summary>

### [`v7.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/releases/tag/7.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/7.1.0...7.2.0)

#### Upgrade Notes

- `docker.from_env()` now honors the active Docker CLI context when `DOCKER_HOST` is not set.
  - This means the client may connect to the daemon selected by `DOCKER_CONTEXT` or the current context in `~/.docker/config.json`, matching Docker CLI behavior more closely.
  - If your application relied on the previous default connection behavior, set `DOCKER_HOST` explicitly, set `DOCKER_CONTEXT=default`, or pass `use_context=False` to `DockerClient.from_env()`.
- Added `docker.from_context()` / `DockerClient.from_context()` for explicitly creating a client from a Docker CLI context.

#### Features

- Added support for Docker contexts when creating the default client
- Added subpath support for volumes

#### Bugfixes

- Fixed `exec_run` documentation for the `stream` parameter
- Fixed image loading to avoid depending on the deprecated `JSONMessage.error` field
- Preserved the rotated unlock key in swarm integration tests
- Fixed SSL certificate generation in tests
- Fixed IPv6 integration tests by explicitly enabling IPv6 where required

#### Miscellaneous

- Updated tests for newer Docker Engine behavior
- CI and build updates

#### What's Changed

- tests/exec: expect 127 exit code for missing executable by [@​laurazard](https://redirect.github.com/laurazard) in [#​3290](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3290)
- fixing doc for stream param in exec\_run by [@​yasonk](https://redirect.github.com/yasonk) in [#​3292](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3292)
- Bump default API version to 1.45 (Moby 26.0/26.1) by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3261](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3261)
- Set a dummy-version if none set, and remove unused APT\_MIRROR build-arg by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3267](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3267)
- test\_service\_logs: stop testing experimental versions by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​2442](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/2442)
- Makefile: fix circular reference for integration-dind by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3297](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3297)
- image load: don't depend on deprecated JSONMessage.error field by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3307](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3307)
- integration: test\_create\_volume\_invalid\_driver allow either 400 or 404 by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3296](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3296)
- integration: adjust tests for omitted "OnBuild" by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3336](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3336)
- Implement Subpath Support for Volumes in Docker-Py ([#​3243](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/issues/3243)) by [@​Khushiyant](https://redirect.github.com/Khushiyant) in [#​3270](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3270)
- tests: fix ssl generation by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3365](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3365)
- test/integration: don't check for deprecated Networks field by [@​thaJeztah](https://redirect.github.com/thaJeztah) in [#​3362](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3362)
- test: Skip from\_env\_unix tests if DOCKER\_HOST is network socket by [@​ricardobranco777](https://redirect.github.com/ricardobranco777) in [#​3366](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3366)
- test\_connect\_with\_ipv6\_address: enable IPv6 by [@​robmry](https://redirect.github.com/robmry) in [#​3372](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3372)
- test\_create\_with\_ipv6\_address: enable IPv6 by [@​robmry](https://redirect.github.com/robmry) in [#​3373](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3373)
- tests: Migrate off gpg2 and regenerate key [`ed25519`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/commit/ed25519) by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​3399](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3399)
- gha: Pin to digests by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​3408](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3408)
- Fix integration tests on non-amd64 hosts and add ARM64 CI by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​3407](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3407)
- integration/swarm: Preserve rotated unlock key by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​3410](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3410)
- \[DKP-2535] Honour context if present for default client, add contexts support by [@​ebriney](https://redirect.github.com/ebriney) in [#​3401](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3401)
- docs: 7.2.0 changelog by [@​vvoland](https://redirect.github.com/vvoland) in [#​3415](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3415)

#### New Contributors

- [@​laurazard](https://redirect.github.com/laurazard) made their first contribution in [#​3290](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3290)
- [@​yasonk](https://redirect.github.com/yasonk) made their first contribution in [#​3292](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3292)
- [@​ricardobranco777](https://redirect.github.com/ricardobranco777) made their first contribution in [#​3366](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3366)
- [@​robmry](https://redirect.github.com/robmry) made their first contribution in [#​3372](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3372)
- [@​ebriney](https://redirect.github.com/ebriney) made their first contribution in [#​3401](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-py/pull/3401)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/docker/docker-py/compare/7.1.0...7.2.0>

</details>
